{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323195339596EF549FC6521EE37E5"}"},"total":338},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7255205097268626234","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，很喜欢。
这绝对是这几年来看过最好看的。
   主角很努力的辅佐嬴政。
嬴政描写的也很好。
   比我上一次看到的一本好多。
那一本我还本以为是主角辅佐嬴政。结果主角烂透。上一秒还信誓旦旦说什么如果跪拜之礼长时间的话，他得要造反。他是现代人，他不习惯。
   下一秒就对一个14岁的少女……
🙃呵呵。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689234168,"group_id":"7217638221935545376","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我坐享无边孤独，又渴望人间烟火","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1fzWUaZukza0h3CWEMLiZ7oOrKenAPhZwKmeGtKupci","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/06c35130864a409c88ab3a0116aee55f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794365&x-signature=7tvIolrLIY73JaIRXFRT%2BvnA9gc%3D","user_id":"3919100862272600","user_name":"孤独烟火"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3919100862272600","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7217638221935545376","book_info":{"abstract":"（别名：大秦：政哥！快看看这张世界地图）
【无cp+系统+大秦+政哥+统一世界】
【海内篇+工业革命+海外篇（又掺杂着海内篇）】
穿越到秦朝的陈凡，利用系统冒充神仙助力嬴政统一世界。
儒生指责嬴政暴政？没关系，反手拿出四大发明造福后世。
百姓生活艰苦，吃不饱？没关系，杂交水稻马铃薯了解一下。
什么？政哥你要征发民工去修长城？等等等等，先看看这张世界地图。
从铁犁牛耕到工业革命，从二世而亡到流传千古，且看梦想中的大秦盛世。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc2fa00994b4facf6558355aedca73958~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"山南有情","author_id":"","book_id":"7217638221935545376","book_name":"工业革命后，我带政哥干翻全世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1223人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":377,"name":"大秦","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=377&name=大秦&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7217638303456363012","read_count":"1223","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"431173"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"215","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,大秦,无女主,架空,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/da685f4bbbde6cee2aa07b82cf7cfb62~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450819&x-signature=qEse0%2BHhuT9adMaLKNvutYvAlPk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99184880111","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.0798169e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323195339596EF549FC6521EE37E5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":13062,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33860,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":9424},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7264193972293157692","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"恭喜完结，一本很好的书，内容很精彩，也更好的写出来与其他小说不同的路线，让一个被带偏的秦二世胡亥重回正轨，体现了“人之初，性本善”的同时，也让秦公子扶苏重新端正儒家思想，不再偏儒腐儒，让秦朝以最完美的方向发展。如果秦始皇不东巡驾崩，或许历史也会如此发展，毕竟秦始皇的功在那，就算过看起来再大，他关注的仍是百姓，立足点就是让百姓更好的生活。","text_exts":[{"e":110,"s":107,"text":"秦始皇","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%A7%A6%E5%A7%8B%E7%9A%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426681921EE37E5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227264193972293157692%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227217638221935545376%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%A7%A6%E5%A7%8B%E7%9A%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691327054,"group_id":"7217638221935545376","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+mJUa9TqMzTCq2+RO5rg1o/56biACOBiKiGEEj357te","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2638436088944159","user_name":"噩㟍"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2638436088944159","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":
